common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.signupSubtitle: Set up your {brand} workspace in minutes. Subscribe to get started.

onboarding.industryTitle: What type of work do you do?
onboarding.industrySubtitle: Choose one or more industry packs. We'll pre-configure modules, menus, and templates for you.

onboarding.title: Subscribe to continue
onboarding.subtitle: Choose your plan and add a payment method to activate your workspace.
onboarding.secureCheckout: Secure checkout powered by Stripe. Apple Pay appears automatically when enabled in your Stripe Dashboard.
onboarding.applePayNote: Apple Pay is available in Stripe Checkout when enabled in the Stripe Dashboard (no extra code required).

success.title: Payment successful
success.subtitle: Your subscription is active. Continuing to setup…
success.wait: Please wait while we activate your subscription.

dunning.title: Payment failed
dunning.subtitle: Update your payment method to restore access to your workspace.

cancel.title: Checkout canceled
cancel.subtitle: No charges were made. You can try again when ready.

manage.title: Billing
manage.subtitle: Manage your subscription, payment method, and invoices.

settings.title: Plan configuration
settings.subtitle: Stripe price IDs are read from app config. Set stripe_price_id per plan in config YAML or environment.
settings.plansHint: Map each plan to a Stripe Price ID (price_…) for live checkout.
settings.envHint: For production, set stripe_price_id in config/app.config.yaml or override via deployment env.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening in your workspace today.

marketing.builtForIndustrySubtitle: Purpose-built workflows for the trades that keep America running
marketing.ctaTitle: Ready to grow your field business?
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Join teams using {brand} to win more jobs, dispatch smarter, and protect their margins.

admin.operatorSubtitle: Cross-tenant console for Innexar Field operators

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Platform-wide SaaS metrics, billing health, and tenant activity.
dashboard.tenantsNeedingAttentionHint: Past due, unpaid, or suspended workspaces.
dashboard.emptyAttentionDesc: No tenants need attention right now.
dashboard.emptyTenantsDesc: Tenants will appear here as they sign up.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Subscription plans, pricing, and Stripe price IDs.
plans.emptyDesc: Create your first subscription plan to enable billing.
plans.deleteConfirm: Delete plan {id}? This cannot be undone.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: All workspaces on the platform.
tenants.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, plan, or status…
tenants.emptyDesc: Create a tenant or adjust your search filters.

recurring.title: Recurring Services
recurring.subtitle: Recurring job templates linked to crews and schedules.
recurring.addDescription: Creates a template for repeat visits. Link a crew to pre-assign field teams.
recurring.emptyDescription: Add a template above for weekly, biweekly, or monthly field work.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: View upcoming jobs by date and time.
schedule.emptyDescription: Create jobs with a scheduled date on the Jobs page to see them here.

scheduleMap.title: Schedule Map
scheduleMap.subtitle: Jobs and active crews on today's map view.
scheduleMap.emptyDescription: Schedule jobs with locations to see them on the map.

takeoff.title: Takeoff
takeoff.subtitle: Square-foot measurements for cleaning estimates — room-by-room sqft capture.
takeoff.newDescription: Enter room dimensions as square feet. Use totals when building per-sqft line items in estimates.
takeoff.floorPlanNote: Floor-plan upload and mobile LiDAR measurement ship in a future release.

priceBook.title: Price book
priceBook.subtitle: Catalog labor, materials, and services for fast estimating.
priceBook.addDescription: Build your catalog — items appear when creating estimates.
priceBook.emptyDescription: Add your first service or material rate above.
priceBook.roomTiersDescription: Set a price per bedroom and bathroom combination. Estimate calculation from property details comes in a later release.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Employees, pay rates, and US tax withholding setup.
payroll.addDescription: Create a W-2 employee or 1099 contractor to run payroll and timesheets.
payroll.emptyDescription: Add W-2 employees and 1099 contractors to run payroll and generate tax forms.

payrollRuns.title: Payroll Runs
payrollRuns.subtitle: Process pay periods, withholdings, and direct deposits.
payrollRuns.emptyDescription: Process your first pay period when employees are set up.

payrollTax.title: Tax Withholding
payrollTax.subtitle: W-4 filing status and federal allowances per employee.
payrollTax.emptyDescription: Add employees on the Payroll page to configure W-4 settings.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage your client relationships and contact details.
customers.addDescription: Create a new customer record for estimates and jobs.
customers.afterCreateHint: After creating a customer, click <view>View & edit</view> to add phone, address, properties, and notes.
customers.emptyDescription: Add your first customer above to start creating estimates and scheduling jobs.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Schedule and track field work from estimate to completion.
jobs.scheduleDescription: Assign work to your crew with a title and optional date.
jobs.emptyDescription: Schedule your first job above or convert an accepted estimate.

estimates.title: Estimates
estimates.subtitle: Create quotes, send to customers, and convert to jobs.
estimates.listDescription: Draft estimates, send quotes, and track acceptance.
estimates.emptyDescription: Start the wizard to build your first quote.
estimates.wizardSubtitle: Build a quote in three steps.
estimates.detailsDescription: Link a customer and give this estimate a clear title.
estimates.customerHint: Customers come from CRM — add one under Customers if needed.
estimates.propertyHint: Link a customer property for bed/bath tier pricing when you calculate.
estimates.propertySelectCustomerFirst: Select a customer to choose a property.
estimates.noPropertiesForCustomer: This customer has no properties yet.
estimates.propertyBedsBaths: {beds, plural, =0 {} other {# bed · }}{baths, plural, =0 {} one {# bath} other {# baths}}
estimates.roomTierHint: {label}: {beds} bed, {baths} bath — tier pricing applies when you calculate.
estimates.roomTierMissingHint: This property is missing bedroom and bathroom counts. Add them under Customer → Properties for automatic tier pricing.
estimates.roomTiersApplied: {count, plural, one {# tier line updated} other {# tier lines updated}}
estimates.linesDescription: Add services from your price book or enter custom lines.
estimates.reviewDescription: Confirm details, then save as draft or send the quote immediately.
estimates.detailSubtitle: Edit line items, calculate totals, and send quotes.
estimates.lineItemsLocked: Line items are locked after the estimate is sent.
estimates.pricingInputsDescription: Apply markup and tax to line-item subtotal. Totals update on calculate.
estimates.taxHint: Avalara integration available under Integrations for live tax.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Bill customers and track payment status.
invoices.newDescription: Generate an invoice from completed work or create one manually.
invoices.emptyDescription: Create your first invoice to start collecting payments.

cleaningJobs.title: Today's Cleans
cleaningJobs.subtitle: Scheduled cleaning jobs for your crew today.
cleaningJobs.emptyDescription: Schedule jobs with today's date on the <jobsLink>Jobs</jobsLink> page or assign a clean phase.

recurringCleans.title: Recurring Cleans
recurringCleans.subtitle: Schedule recurring cleaning visits by frequency and phase.

cleanPhases.title: Clean Phases
cleanPhases.subtitle: Track rough, final, and premium cleaning phases per job.
cleanPhases.emptyDescription: Assign cleaning phases to jobs as work progresses.

crews.title: Crews
crews.subtitle: Manage field crews, leads, and skills.
crews.addDescription: Define teams for dispatch, routes, and recurring service assignments.
crews.emptyDescription: Create your first crew to assign jobs and routes.
crews.noMembers: No employees assigned to this crew yet.

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Today's job sequence — route optimization coming soon.
routes.emptyDescription: Assign crews and schedule jobs to build today's route.

workOrders.title: Work Orders
workOrders.subtitle: Dispatch and track field work orders with priority and SLA.
workOrders.emptyDescription: Create your first work order to start dispatching technicians.
workOrders.afterCreateHint: After creating a work order, open it to assign a technician from payroll.

dispatch.title: Dispatch Board
dispatch.subtitle: Work orders grouped by status with technician assignments.
dispatch.emptyTitle: No work orders on the board
dispatch.emptyDescription: Create work orders to see them organized by status here.

workOrderDetail.subtitle: Work order status, linked job, and technician assignments.
workOrderDetail.assignmentsDescription: Assign employees from payroll to this work order.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Construction projects, budgets, and change orders.
projects.emptyDescription: Create a construction project to track budget and milestones.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Sales pipeline — drag prospects through each stage to conversion.
leads.addDescription: Track inbound interest from your website, referrals, or field visits.
leads.afterCreateHint: After adding a lead, click <view>View details</view> to update contact info and move pipeline stages.
leads.emptyDescription: Add prospects to track your sales funnel.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track job expenses and approve reimbursements.
expenses.emptyDescription: Log expenses from the field or add them manually.

timesheets.title: Timesheets
timesheets.subtitle: Track hours by employee and job for payroll.
timesheets.emptyDescription: Clock in from mobile or add hours manually.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Payments received and pending collection.
payments.emptyDescription: Payments appear here when invoices are paid.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: Service agreements and recurring maintenance contracts.
contracts.emptyDescription: Create service agreements for recurring customers.

changeOrders.title: Change Orders
changeOrders.subtitle: Scope changes and budget adjustments for construction projects.
changeOrders.emptyDescription: Document scope changes as projects evolve.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.subtitle: Billing milestones tied to project completion percentages.
milestones.emptyDescription: Define billing milestones for construction projects.

subcontractors.title: Subcontractors
subcontractors.subtitle: Trade partners and subcontractor coordination.
subcontractors.emptyDescription: Add trade partners for project coordination.

permits.title: Permits
permits.subtitle: Track building permits and jurisdictional approvals.
permits.emptyDescription: Log permits as you pull them for projects.

lienWaivers.title: Lien Waivers
lienWaivers.subtitle: Conditional and unconditional lien waivers for project payments.
lienWaivers.emptyDescription: Generate waivers when releasing project payments.

rfis.title: RFIs
rfis.subtitle: Requests for information — clarify specs and drawings during construction.
rfis.emptyDescription: Submit RFIs to clarify project specifications.

chartOfAccounts.title: Chart of Accounts
chartOfAccounts.subtitle: General ledger accounts and balances.
chartOfAccounts.emptyDescription: Set up your chart of accounts for bookkeeping.

accountsPayable.title: Accounts Payable
accountsPayable.subtitle: Vendor bills and payment obligations.
accountsPayable.emptyDescription: Vendor bills appear here when recorded.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Vendor POs tied to jobs and materials.
purchaseOrders.emptyDescription: Create POs for materials and subcontractor work.

jobCosting.title: Job Costing
jobCosting.subtitle: Budget vs actual margins on every job.
jobCosting.emptyDescription: Job costing appears when projects and expenses are tracked.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: In-app alerts for billing, jobs, and sales activity.
notifications.emptyDescription: Alerts for jobs, billing, and sales appear here.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: P&L, cash flow, WIP, and operational KPIs.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and payment method.

projectDetail.subtitle: Project budget, schedule, and related records.

cleaningSupplies.title: Supplies
cleaningSupplies.subtitle: Track inventory and reorder thresholds per crew or property.

marketplace.title: Marketplace

portal.subtitle: Branded self-service for {brand} customers — configure links and preview the experience.

login.subtitle: Access your invoices and account with {brand}.

login.linkSent: If an account exists for this email, we sent a sign-in link. Check your inbox.

invoices.title: Your invoices
invoices.subtitle: Invoices for {name} at {company}
invoices.emptyDescription: When your provider sends an invoice, it will appear here.

bookings.title: Your bookings
bookings.subtitle: Upcoming jobs and appointments for {name}
bookings.emptyDescription: Scheduled jobs linked to your account will appear here.
bookings.readOnlyHint: Contact your service provider to reschedule or cancel.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Support threads for {name}
messages.emptyDescription: Submit a support request and your conversation history will appear here.

support.formHint: Describe your issue and we will follow up by email.

priceBookImport.subtitle: Upload a CSV to bulk-load services and rates into your catalog.

settingsIntegrations.title: Integrations
settingsIntegrations.subtitle: Connect accounting, tax, and payment providers. Configuration is driven by app.config.yaml.

settingsModules.title: Modules
settingsModules.subtitle: Enable or disable plugins after onboarding. Core modules stay active.

settingsUsers.title: Users
settingsUsers.subtitle: Workspace members with access to this tenant. Invites and role management coming soon.

settingsTemplates.listDescription: Reusable emails for invoices, reminders, and customer updates.
settingsTemplates.emptyTemplates: No email templates yet. Create one to get started.
settingsTemplates.variablesHint: Use {{customer_name}} and {{invoice_number}} in subject and body.
settingsTemplates.testSendDescription: Uses platform SMTP when configured; otherwise logs the message only.
